headline: The Estée Lauder Companies Appoints Madeleine Boyd as Senior Vice President, Global Brand Communications
summary: NEW YORK, July 16, 2026--The Estée Lauder Companies Inc. (NYSE: EL) today announced the appointment of Madeleine Boyd as Senior Vice President, Global Brand Communications, effective July 20, 2026.
